title: Construction and applicability
doc_html:
§470.6. Construction and applicability

            A. The rights granted by this Subpart are cumulative and shall be in addition to any others provided by law.

            B. The property rights granted by this Subpart vest with an individual or the individual's authorized representative on August 1, 2022.

            Acts 2022, No. 425, §1.
doc_text:
§470.6.  Construction and applicability
A.  The rights granted by this Subpart are cumulative and shall be in addition to any
others provided by law.
B.  The property rights granted by this Subpart vest with an individual or the
individual's authorized representative on August 1, 2022.
Acts 2022, No. 425, §1.
